title: Banisteriopsis pulcherrima
taxonomy: Banisteriopsis pulcherrima is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the genus Banisteriopsis, which is a group of plants native to the tropical regions of South America. The Malpighiaceae family consists of approximately 130 genera and over 2,000 species of plants. These plants are commonly known as the Barbados or Malpighi families and are native to the Americas. The classification of Banisteriopsis pulcherrima reflects its botanical and evolutionary relationships within this family of flowering plants.

Some studies suggest that extracts from this plant may have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which could contribute to its traditional use in treating various health issues.
